# majordome_utilities.plotting

```{python}
from majordome_utilities.documents import *
from majordome_utilities import plotting
```

```{python}
def extract_signature(
        f,
        greedy = True,
        lexer = PythonLexer(),
        termf = Terminal256Formatter(),
    ):
    name = f.__name__
    docs = {p.arg_name: p for p in parse(f.__doc__).params}

    values = []
    text = []

    sig = inspect.signature(f)

    # file = Path(inspect.getsourcefile(f)).relative_to(Path.cwd()).as_posix()
    # lines = inspect.getsourcelines(f)

    # print(f"""\
    #     - {file}:{lines}
    #     """)

    for param_name, param in sig.parameters.items():
        if greedy and param_name not in docs:
            raise ValueError(
                f"Parameter '{param_name}' not found in docstring "
                f"for function '{name}'! Stopping documentation!"
            )

        entry = FunctionEntry(param)
        output = highlight(str(entry), lexer, termf)
        values.append(f"    {output.strip()}")

    returns = sig.return_annotation

    if returns is not inspect.Signature.empty:
        if isinstance(returns, type):
            returns = returns.__name__
        else:
            returns = str(returns)

    signature = f"{name}(\n{',\n'.join(values)}\n) -> {returns}"
    return signature
```
```{python}
f = plotting.MajordomePlot

signature = extract_signature(f)
print_signature(signature)
```

```{python}
inspect.ismethod(plotting.MajordomePlot)
inspect.isfunction(plotting.MajordomePlot)
inspect.ismethod(plotting.MajordomePlot.new)
```

```{python}
inspect.getdoc(f)
```
